message:
refactor(validation): centralize validation constants, add dependency validation

Extract 7 magic numbers into named pub const values:
- MAX_TITLE_CHARS (500), MAX_DESCRIPTION_BYTES (102,400),
  MAX_ESTIMATED_MINUTES (525,960), MAX_EXTERNAL_REF_CHARS (200),
  MAX_LABEL_CHARS (50), MAX_AUTHOR_CHARS (200), MAX_COMMENT_BODY_BYTES (51,200)

Add validate_embedded_dependencies() rejecting self-dependencies, empty
depends_on_id, mismatched issue_id, and external-ref in parent-child deps.

Update comments.rs to import MAX_COMMENT_BODY_BYTES (eliminating duplicate).
Update tools.rs to import MAX_TITLE_CHARS, fix McpError::internal_error(),
add clippy::too_many_lines allows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
